idea-plugin.name: sideshell Terminal Control
idea-plugin.description:
Exposes JetBrains IDE terminal control for AI agents via sideshell MCP server.

Provides a Unix socket bridge that lets sideshell control IDE terminals: read output, execute commands, create tabs/splits, and more.

Works with all JetBrains IDEs: IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, GoLand, RustRover, PhpStorm, Android Studio, etc.
